versions.manufacturer: Test Corporation With An Exceptionally Long Company Name That May Cause Buffer Issues
versions.description: This is an extremely long description field that is designed to test buffer truncation handling in the ODBC driver. It contains enough text to potentially exceed typical buffer sizes used by applications like Altium Designer when querying the database.
